title: Mailer Settings
description: Email sending and rate limiting configuration

whitelist.label: Email Domain Whitelist
whitelist.help: Array of allowed email domains (e.g., ["@yourcompany.com", "@trustedclient.com"]). Leave empty to disable whitelist.

ratePerIp.label: Rate Limit per IP
ratePerIp.help: Maximum number of emails that can be sent from a single IP address per time window.

ratePerTemplate.label: Rate Limit per Template
ratePerTemplate.help: Maximum number of emails that can be sent using a single template per time window.

rateWindow.label: Rate Limit Window (seconds)
rateWindow.help: Time window in seconds for rate limiting. Default is 300 seconds (5 minutes).
